whatIsRift.label: AI Platform?
whatIsRift.heading: What is RIFT?
whatIsRift.body: RIFT is our solution to the constant changes in the world of artificial intelligence, unifying all AI models in a single platform and giving users the opportunity not only to use one model but to access dozens of models, enabling users to grow, get better results and improve their experience.

cta.heading: Ready to get started?
cta.summary: Start using RIFT for free and discover the power of AI.

pricing.heading: Simple, Transparent Plans
pricing.summary: Choose the plan that best fits your needs. No hidden costs.

plus.description: For users who want to try the power of AI.

pro.description: For professionals who need more capacity.

enterprise.description: For large teams with specific needs.

architecture.label: Architecture
architecture.heading: Why we're different
architecture.fastResponsesDesc: When you send a message, RIFT finds the fastest available AI server and responds in milliseconds.
architecture.allModels: All AI models in one place
architecture.allModelsDesc: With RIFT you don't need to pay, manage or configure multiple AI services. Just use RIFT and enjoy a worry-free experience.
architecture.dataPrivacyDesc: Unlike other free services, we take the security of your data seriously. We do not use your conversations or private data to train our models or sell them to third parties.
architecture.orgReadyDesc: Give your organization members access in minutes by linking your Google Workspace, Microsoft Teams and many other platforms, with guides and tutorials.
architecture.advancedIntegrationsDesc: We offer SCIM, JIT, Directory Sync, SSO/SAML/OIDC, audit logs and many other features for organizations.

performance.label: Performance
performance.heading: Unmatched speed
performance.intro: Since creating RIFT, we knew speed was a key factor for team efficiency. That's why RIFT lets you work with models of up to 4,000 tokens per second, with no performance or latency issues.
performance.oneSubscriptionDesc: Access all AI models with a single subscription. No need for multiple accounts or separate payments.
performance.chooseModelsDesc: Select the most suitable model for each task from our wide range of options.
performance.noLimitsDesc: We don't limit you to one AI provider. Combine the best of each in a single platform.
performance.bestResults: Better results, faster and more secure
performance.bestResultsDesc: Get more accurate, faster and more secure answers by combining the best AI models on the market.
performance.catalogSummary: We have one of the most complete AI model libraries, constantly updated.

mockChatExamples.ai:
**Quantum computing** is a paradigm that leverages phenomena like *superposition* and *entanglement*.

Key differences:
- **Classical bits**: 0 or 1.
- **Qubits**: 0, 1, or both at once.

This allows solving complex problems (e.g. cryptography) exponentially faster.

mockChatExamples.user: Generate a Fibonacci function in Python
mockChatExamples.ai:
Here's an optimized recursive implementation with memoization:

```python
def fib(n, memo={}):
    if n in memo: return memo[n]
    if n <= 1: return n
    memo[n] = fib(n-1, memo) + fib(n-2, memo)
    return memo[n]
```

mockChatExamples.user: Study plan to learn classical physics in 1 month
mockChatExamples.ai:
### Week 1: Mechanics
1. **Days 1-2**: Kinematics (linear and circular motion).
2. **Days 3-4**: Dynamics (Newton's laws, forces).
3. **Day 5**: Energy and work.

### Week 2: Thermodynamics and Waves
- **Thermodynamics**: Heat, temperature and laws.
- **Waves**: Harmonic motion and mechanical waves.

### Weeks 3-4: Electromagnetism
- **Electrostatics**: Electric field and potential.
- **Magnetism**: Magnetic field and Lorentz force.
- **Induction**: Faraday's law and alternating currents.

integrations.label: Integrations
integrations.heading: Connect RIFT with your organization
integrations.intro: Instant, friction-free implementation. Automatically sync users and groups with the tools you already use.
integrations.supportNote: Support for SCIM, JIT, Directory Sync, SSO (SAML/OIDC), MFA policies and advanced audit logs.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.summary: We answer your questions about RIFT and how we can help you get the most out of AI.

items.question: What is RIFT?
items.answer: RIFT is a web platform that gives you access to the world's most advanced AI models under one subscription, eliminating the need to manage and pay for multiple services separately.

items.question: What AI models are available?
items.answer: We offer access to a wide range of leading models, including OpenAI's GPT family, Anthropic's Claude, Google's Gemini, xAI, DeepSeek and open-source models like Mistral. We constantly add the latest models as soon as they are released.

items.question: What's the difference between standard and premium messages?
items.answer: The most advanced and powerful models use your 'premium' message quota, while lighter, faster models use the 'standard' quota. This lets you use the right model for each task.

items.question: How do plans and limits work?
items.answer: The Plus plan includes 1,000 standard and 100 premium messages per month. The Pro plan increases this to 2,700 standard and 270 premium with priority support. If you need custom limits or corporate billing, the Enterprise plan is for you.

items.question: Do you offer enterprise integrations?
items.answer: Yes, RIFT Enterprise integrates with your existing infrastructure. We support directory sync with Google Workspace, Microsoft 365 and Okta via SCIM, plus Single Sign-On (SSO) and advanced audit logs to meet your security requirements.

items.question: Can I cancel at any time?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your dashboard. There are no mandatory terms or penalties for Plus and Pro plans.

items.question: How do you handle my data privacy?
items.answer: Your privacy is fundamental. All data is encrypted at rest. Unlike free services, we do not use your conversations or private data to train our models.
